jd_summary: Senior Design Operations Program Manager embedded in Mercury's 40+ person Design team (a fintech/banking company). Owns complex horizontal design programs end-to-end: scoping, sequencing, trade-offs, operational systems, rituals, and cross-team coordination. This is a Design Operations / program-management role, NOT a core HR/People role.
yoe_required: 3-6+ years in a design-focused operations or program role

key_points.one_liner: Design Operations program role (3-6+ yrs) on Mercury's design team - adjacent to People ops but Design-org, not HR.
key_points.years_experience_asked: 3-6+ years in a design-focused operations or program role
must_have_skills: 3-6+ years in a design-focused operations or program role
Demonstrated high bar for quality and attention to detail, fostering accountability
Proven ability to influence without authority and coordinate across teams, product areas, and platforms
Demonstrated ownership of complex horizontal programs (scoping, sequencing, trade-offs)
Skill in anticipating and mitigating risks across people, process, and tools
History of driving operational excellence by improving systems end-to-end
key_points.comp: $163,000-$203,800 (NYC/LA/Seattle/SF Bay); lower tiers for other US locations
